UserProgress.title: User Progress
UserProgress.description: Stores the game state for each user.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user (Firebase Auth UID).

currentLevelId.description: The ID of the current level the user is on.

inventory.description: List of items the user has collected.

solvedPuzzles.description: List of puzzle IDs the user has solved.

completedLevels.description: List of level IDs the user has completed.

isGameWon.description: Whether the user has won the game.

message.description: The last message shown to the user.

updatedAt.description: The last time the progress was saved.

userProgress/{userId}.description: Stores progress for each user, keyed by their UID.
